# payload-img-convert plugin
> The developer-first image optimization pipeline for Payload CMS v3. Automatic WebP, AVIF, PNG & JPEG conversion with zero setup required.

## Main sections
- [Home](/): Feature overview, code examples, and value proposition for the payload-img-convert plugin.

## Key facts
- Converts uploads to WebP, AVIF, PNG, or JPEG on create/update within Payload CMS.
- Provides per-image format selection via the Payload admin sidebar.
- Fallback to global defaultFormat.
- Configurable quality globally and per-format.
- Preserves aspect ratios without enlargement by default (`fit: 'inside'`, `withoutEnlargement: true`).
- Skips SVG and GIF automatically to preserve animations and vectors.
- Seamlessly integrates before other Payload beforeOperation hooks.
- Leverages Payload's native managed Sharp instance, requiring no extra heavyweight dependencies.
- Open Source and MIT Licensed by Stian Larsen.
